description_long: This is a discarded Coca-Cola can, cylindrical in shape with a slightly tapered top and bottom. The can is predominantly red with white Coca-Cola branding and dynamic white and yellow swooshes wrapping around the body. Small water droplets are visible on the surface, giving it a freshly chilled appearance. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard pull tab, and the bottom is also silver and slightly concave. Nutritional information, a barcode, and other product details are printed on the back. The can appears empty and undamaged, with no visible dents or rust.
description: A red Coca-Cola can with white branding, metallic top and bottom, and visible product details. The surface is glossy with water droplets and no visible damage.
description_view_0: The can is upright with the back label, barcode, and nutritional information clearly visible, while a second can lies on its side showing the pull tab.
description_view_1: The can is shown from the back with the Coca-Cola logo partially visible, and a horizontal can displays the full logo and top surface.
description_view_2: The can is upright with the Coca-Cola logo and swooshes in full view, while the bottom of the horizontal can is visible and unmarked.
description_view_3: The can is upright with the Coca-Cola logo facing forward, flanked by two horizontal cans showing their sides and tops.
attribute_brand_logo: White Coca-Cola script logo with dynamic swooshes on a red background.
attribute_barcode: Vertical black-and-white barcode on the back label.
